taxonomy: Empusa barbata is a species of fungus gnat in the family Mycetophilidae. It belongs to the genus Empusa, which includes various species of fungus gnats. The classification of Empusa barbata is further categorized under the order Diptera, which encompasses flies and gnats. Empusa barbata is closely related to other species in the family Mycetophilidae, which is a large and diverse group of fungus gnats. This classification reflects the insect's unique characteristics and its ecological role in decomposing organic matter.
